context_notes: Mid /gsd-plan-phase 1 for Guezzer (KGLW setlist predictor PWA). Session was paused right after dispatching the researcher agent — a clean checkpoint because the plan-phase workflow is fully resumable from init. Key config from init: research_enabled=true, plan_checker_enabled=true, nyquist_validation_enabled=true, commit_docs=true, all agent models 'inherit', TEXT_MODE=false, CHUNKED_MODE=false. Phase requirement IDs: DATA-01, DATA-02, DATA-03, DATA-04. CONTEXT.md exists at .planning/phases/01-corpus-ingestion-schema-foundation/01-CONTEXT.md and must be passed to all downstream agents. No git branch changes were made (plan-phase branch invariant).
